title: Refactor logging around flaky worker
summary: Logging cleanup may help understand a flaky worker issue.
expectedBehavior: Worker logging should clearly identify flake origin.
actualBehavior: Root cause is unclear and logs are noisy.
reproductionSteps: Observe intermittent failure without a stable repro.
patchOutline: Rework logging around the worker scheduler.
Maybe restructure retries and error formatting.
